item.description:
## What's Changed

- Cloud detail now refreshes stale transcript caches when a recording's `updatedAt` advances, covering the case where summary content arrives later while `activeTranscriptId` stays the same.
- When this freshness heuristic triggers, Recappi drops the stale transcript/job caches and explicitly reloads transcript content instead of relying on `.task(id:)` to refire.
- Added unit coverage for `updatedAt` advancement edge cases.

## Validation

- `swift test` passed: 87/87 tests.
- `git diff --check` passed.
- Local stable-signed `./scripts/build-app.sh` passed.
- `codesign -dvv build/RecappiMini.app` confirmed `Authority=RecappiMini Dev`.

## Known Limitations / Follow-up

- `updatedAt` is used as a cloud detail freshness heuristic; non-transcript metadata changes may cause a harmless transcript refetch.
